title: Stage 3 Decorators
description: Master Stage 3 Decorators to inject cross-cutting concerns (e.g., logging, validation, authorization) into classes and methods. Implement decorators to extend functionality without polluting core business logic.
objectives: Master Stage 3 Decorators to inject cross-cutting concerns (e.g., logging, validation, authorization) into classes and methods.
Implement decorators to extend functionality without polluting core business logic.
